final_prompt.prompt:
Create an abstract expressionist artwork for modern art gallery display.

Style/medium: abstract expressionism, gestural painting with bold impasto brushwork, energetic mark-making, non-representational, inspired by Willem de Kooning and Franz Kline
Composition: dynamic asymmetrical balance, sweeping diagonal movements, no focal point, all-over composition
Subject: pure emotion and energy through abstract forms, no recognizable objects or figures
Scene/backdrop: neutral gallery wall context implied, canvas as the entire field
Lighting/mood: dramatic contrast between saturated hues, visceral and intense emotional impact
Color palette: bold clashing colors—cadmium red against ultramarine blue, acidic yellows, raw umber, titanium white highlights, high chroma saturation
Materials/textures: thick oil paint application, visible bristle marks, layered glazing, canvas weave texture
Avoid: figurative elements, geometric precision, digital smoothness, pastel tones, representational imagery, Behance generic gradients
